mapper.insert: /* ams-item-icimgbatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertIcImgMetaBatch */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_ICIMG_META_BATCH ( CTKEY, ICKEY, FILEPATH, FILENM ) SELECT Z.CTKEY, Y.ICKEY, SUBSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, 1, INSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, '/', -1)) AS FILEPATH, SUBSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, INSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, '/', -1) + 1) AS FILENM FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_IC X JOIN TORDER_MST_IC Y ON X.ONLD_PD_NO = Y.ICKEY AND Y.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TORDER_MST_CT Z ON Z.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND Z.DELYN = 'N' WHERE X.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND X.RPS_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, '/', -1) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_ICIMG_META_BATCH B WHERE B.CTKEY = Z.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = Y.ICKEY AND B.FILEPATH = SUBSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, 1, INSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, '/', -1)) AND B.FILENM = SUBSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, INSTR(X.RPS_IMG_URL, '/', -1) + 1) )
